zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne MacDonald於1406年出生在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特拉斯賀布藍時，她的父親John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg55歲，母親Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim36歲。她於1425年與Sir James Stewart 3rd Laird of Auchingowan and Blackhall and Ardgowan在愛爾蘭結婚。她去世於1475年在愛爾蘭庫迪 安特里姆享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne MacDonald于1406年出生在英国苏格兰斯林史爾斯特拉斯賀布藍时，她的父亲John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg55岁，母亲Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim36岁。她于1425年与Sir James Stewart 3rd Laird of Auchingowan and Blackhall and Ardgowan在爱尔兰结婚。她去世于1475年在爱尔兰庫迪 安特里姆享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Anne

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne MacDonald was born in 1406, in Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg, was 55 and her mother, Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim, was 36. She married Sir James Stewart 3rd Laird of Auchingowan and Blackhall and Ardgowan in 1425, in Ireland. She died in 1475, in County Antrim, Ireland, at the age of 69.

Elle a épousé Sir James Stewart 3rd Laird of Auchingowan and Blackhall and Ardgowan en 1425, à Irlande. Elle est décédée en 1475, à County Antrim, Irlande, à l’âge de 69 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne MacDonald(이)가 1406년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스트래스블랜에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1425년 아일랜드에서 Sir James Stewart 3rd Laird of Auchingowan and Blackhall and Ardgowan(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1475년 아일랜드 카운티 앤트림에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Ard-du, Islay, Argyll, Scotland: ислеи, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne MacDonald родилась в 1406 г. в местности стратблан, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Stewart 3rd Laird of Auchingowan and Blackhall and Ardgowan в 1425 г. в местности Ирландия. Она умерла в 1475 г. в местности коунти антрим, Ирландия в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anne MacDonald nació en 1406, en Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Sir James Stewart 3rd Laird of Auchingowan and Blackhall and Ardgowan en 1425, en Irlanda. Murió en 1475, en County Antrim, Irlanda, a la edad de 69 años.
